subcodes.first_line: O Salman! Upon thee be the grace of the All-Merciful. Time and again hast thou been favored by the Most Exalted Pen. At this moment, a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلمان علیک عنایه الرحمن لازال بعنایت قلم اعلی فائز بوده ئی این حین مکتوبی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
